headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on Halliburton, Lowers Price Target to $29
summary: Barclays  analyst David Anderson   maintains Halliburton (NYSE:HAL) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $30 to $29.

headline: Is There Still Value In Halliburton (HAL) After Its 76% One Year Share Price Jump
summary: If you are wondering whether Halliburton at around US$37.80 still offers value, or if most of the opportunity is already reflected in the price, this article breaks down what the current valuation numbers indicate. The stock has been relatively flat over the last 7 days with a 0.5% decline, while the 30 day return of 9.1% and year to date return of 27.7% sit alongside a 76.0% return over the past year. Recent attention on Halliburton has centered on its role as a major energy services...
